NAME: Qatar Biobank
MANUAL_CITATION: Al Kuwari, H., Al Thani, A., Al Marri, A., Al Kaabi, A., Abderrahim, H., Afifi, N., ... & Elliott, P. (2015). The Qatar Biobank: background and methods. BMC public health, 15(1), 1-9.
DESCRIPTION: Qatar Biobank is a national long-term health research initiative that recruits consenting adults in Qatar, collects biological samples and health data, and supports population and genomic research on diseases relevant to the region (often analyzed together with the Qatar Genome Program).
